# Generative Artifact Protocol

> An open protocol (GAP) for token-efficient artifact generation and updates by LLMs: producers emit small JSON edit envelopes targeting `<gap:target>` markers or JSON Pointers, and a stateless Rust apply engine resolves them in microseconds instead of regenerating the whole artifact. Ships the normative spec, the reference implementation (crates.io: `generative-artifact-protocol`), and an eval harness measuring token, cost, and correctness deltas on real LLM runs.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/README.md): Features, installation, measured results, free-tier eval guide
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture, commands, and conventions for AI agents
- [GAP specification](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/spec/gap.md): Normative wire format, envelopes, conformance levels (gap/0.1)
- [GAP-SSE binding](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/spec/gap-sse.md): SSE transport binding for streaming envelopes
- [Experiment methodology](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/assets/evals/experiments/EXPERIMENT.md): Eval dataset layout, flows, and validity gates
- [STEELMAN](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/apps/eval/STEELMAN.md): Methodology critique and the protocol's loss region

## Key Files

- [src/apply.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/src/apply.rs): The stateless `apply(artifact?, envelope)` reference implementation
- [src/gap.rs](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/src/gap.rs): Envelope, artifact, and edit-op wire types
- [envelope schema](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/spec/schemas/artifact-envelope.json): JSON Schema for the envelope wire format
- [results.md](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/assets/evals/experiments/results.md): Aggregated measurements, regenerated by `just report`
- [justfile](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/justfile): Build, test, bench, and eval recipes

## Skills

- [run-evals](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/skills/run-evals/SKILL.md): Run the LLM eval suite and regenerate its reports

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Dev workflow and PR guidelines
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [example envelopes](https://github.com/urmzd/generative-artifact-protocol/blob/main/spec/examples/synthesize.json): Canonical synthesize/edit envelope examples
